name: assets-prefab-instantiate
title: Assets / Prefab / Instantiate
description: Instantiates prefab in the current active scene. Use 'assets-find' tool to find prefab assets in the project.

parameters.name: prefabAssetPath
parameters.description: Path to the prefab asset. Example: "Assets/Prefabs/MyPrefab.prefab"

parameters.name: gameObjectPath
parameters.description: GameObject path in the current active scene.

parameters.name: isLocalSpace
parameters.description: World or Local space of transform.

commonMistakes: Parameters are prefabAssetPath + gameObjectPath, NOT prefabRef
